{# Overrides pydata-sphinx-theme's component to drop the visible "Section Navigation" heading while keeping the nav's aria-label for screen readers. Mirrors the theme's own template otherwise. #} {% set show_nav_level = meta['html_theme.show_nav_level'] if (meta is defined and meta is not none and 'html_theme.show_nav_level' in meta) else theme_show_nav_level %}
{{- generate_toctree_html( "sidebar", show_nav_level=show_nav_level | int, maxdepth=theme_navigation_depth | int, collapse=theme_collapse_navigation | tobool, includehidden=theme_sidebar_includehidden | tobool, titles_only=True ) -}}
